# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

parameters: 
- name: storageAccountName   # Provide a unique identifier as parameter key (name of your deployment)     
 - type: string    
    default: mystorageaccount                      //Provided by user or can be provided during creation time if not specified.       Default is 'mystorageaccount'.        Please replace with the actual storage account name you intend to use  # Storage Account Name         
- name: location             # Provide a unique identifier as parameter key (location of your deployment)     It specifies where resources will reside in general Azure geographical region      The default value is '[resourceGroup().location]'         Defaults are provided by the platform if not specified.  Replace with actual resource group name and location
- name: skuName             # Provide a unique identifier as parameter key (SKU of your deployment)   Defines storage account SKUs in different tiers like standard, premium etc..    The default value is 'Standard_LRS'          Defaults are provided by the platform if not specified.  Replace with actual sku name
- name: kind                # Provide a unique identifier as parameter key (Kind of your deployment)   It indicates what type to create - BlobStorage for storage account and FileShare, etc       The default value is 'BlobStorage'          Defaults are provided by the platform if not specified.  Replace with actual Kind
- name: accessTier             # Provide a unique identifier as parameter key (Access Tier of your deployment)   It defines when to archive stored data for long term retention and performance, like Hot/Cool       The default value is 'Hot'           Defaults are provided by the platform if not specified.  Replace with actual access tier
- name: accountSasPermissions # Provide a unique identifier as parameter key (Permission of SAS Token)   Defines permissions for Blob Storage Account to get via Shared Access Signature        The default value is 'Blob'       Defaults are provided by the platform if not specified.  Replace with actual Permission
- name: containerName      # Provide a unique identifier as parameter key (container of your deployment)   It sets up how data gets stored in blobs           Note that when created, new containers will be auto deleted    The default value is 'logs'       Defaults are provided by the platform if not specified.  Replace with actual container name
- name: storageAccountType # Provide a unique identifier as parameter key (type of your deployment)   Defines what type to use for this account         If you want it standard_lrs, Standard_GRS etc...    The default value is 'Standard_LRS'          Defaults are provided by the platform if not specified.  Replace with actual storage Account Type
